title: Occupational radiation exposure - Canada.ca
content:
## Occupational radiation exposure
Learn how Health Canada protects you against  unsafe levels of radiation given off from some devices.

## Services and information

### About occupational exposure to radiation
Health risks, background, minimizing risk, exposure pathways

### National Dose Registry
Dose history summary request form, information for employees and employers, reports on occupational radiation exposure in Canada

### Radiation safety codes
What safety codes are, who may require and enforce them, and codes for specific types of radiation emitting devices.

### National Dosimetry Services
NDS provides Canadian workers with personal dosimetry products and services to monitor exposure to ionizing radiation

### Radiation guidelines
Guidelines for tanning equipment owners, Laser hair removal – safety guidelines for facility owners, Guidelines for the safe use of diagnostic ultrasound, Guidelines for the safe use of ultrasound: Part 1 – Medical and Paramedical Applications
- Canadian Nuclear Safety Commission
